mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toss_batch_run (job_name, status, message) VALUES (#{jobName}, #{status}, #{message})
mapper.update: UPDATE toss_batch_run SET finished_at = #{finishedAt}, status = #{status}, requested_count = #{requestedCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, skipped_count = #{skippedCount}, saved_rows = #{savedRows}, message = #{message} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toss_stock_info ( symbol, name, english_name, isin_code, market, security_type, common_share, status, currency, list_date, delist_date, shares_outstanding, leverage_factor, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{name}, #{englishName}, #{isinCode}, #{market}, #{securityType}, #{commonShare}, #{status}, #{currency}, #{listDate}, #{delistDate}, #{sharesOutstanding}, #{leverageFactor}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), english_name = VALUES(english_name), isin_code = VALUES(isin_code), market = VALUES(market), security_type = VALUES(security_type), common_share = VALUES(common_share), status = VALUES(status), currency = VALUES(currency), list_date = VALUES(list_date), delist_date = VALUES(delist_date), shares_outstanding = VALUES(shares_outstanding), leverage_factor = VALUES(leverage_factor), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO toss_stock_warning ( symbol, warning_type, exchange, start_date, end_date, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{warningType}, #{exchange}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exchange = VALUES(exchange), end_date = VALUES(end_date), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO toss_candle ( symbol, interval_code, candle_time, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, currency, adjusted, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{intervalCode}, #{candleTime}, #{tradeDate}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{volume}, #{currency}, #{adjusted}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE trade_date = VALUES(trade_date), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = VALUES(volume), currency = VALUES(currency), adjusted = VALUES(adjusted), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
